name: godot_docs
description: Fetch Godot Engine documentation. Use fetch_class for class references (e.g. CharacterBody2D), fetch_page for tutorials/guides. Auto-detects Godot version from editor connection. Returns clean markdown.

action.description:
fetch_class: Get a class reference by name
fetch_page: Get any docs page by path

class_name.description: Class name to fetch, e.g. "CharacterBody2D" (required for: fetch_class)

version.description: Godot docs version. If omitted, auto-detects from connected Godot editor or defaults to "stable"

section.description: Which class-reference section to return (default: full). Use specific sections to reduce token usage. (for: fetch_class)
